title: ranunculus latifolius
intro: Ranunculus latifolius, also known as the broad-leaf buttercup, is a perennial plant species in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus latifolius include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, salve, or infusion for its medicinal uses, although its preparation and dosing should be done under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
